Colossians1:1 Bulus
Colossians1:2 Zuwa ga tsarkaka da kuma amintattun ’yan’uwa cikin Kiristi da suke a Kolossi. Alheri da salama daga Allah Ubanmu
Colossians1:3 Kullum muna gode wa Allah
Colossians1:4 Gama mun ji labarin bangaskiyarku a cikin Yesu Kiristi da kuma ƙaunar da kuke yi saboda dukan tsarkaka.
Colossians1:5 Kuna yin haka ne kuwa domin abin da kuke bege yana a ajiye a sama. Kun riga kun ji game da wannan bege sa’ad da kuka gaskata saƙon nan na gaskiya wanda shi ne bisharar
Colossians1:6 da ta zo muku. Ko’ina a duniya wannan bishara tana yi ta haihuwa tana kuma girma
Colossians1:7 Kun koyi wannan gaskiya daga wurin Efafaras
Colossians1:8 wanda kuma ya faɗa mana ƙaunar da kuke yi cikin Ruhu.
Colossians1:9 Shi ya sa tun daga ranar da muka sami labarin
Colossians1:10 Ta haka za ku yi rayuwa wadda ta dace da Ubangiji
Colossians1:11 Allah yă ƙarfafa ku da dukan iko bisa ga ɗaukakar ƙarfinsa domin ku kasance da jimrewa sosai da kuma haƙuri
Colossians1:12 kuna gode wa Uba
Colossians1:13 Gama ya riga ya cece mu daga mulkin duhu ya kuma kawo mu cikin mulkin Ɗan da yake ƙauna
Colossians1:14 wanda ta wurinsa muka sami fansa da kuma gafarar zunubai.
Colossians1:15 Kiristi shi ne surar da ake gani na Allah wanda ba a iya gani
Colossians1:16 Ta wurinsa aka halicci dukan abu
Colossians1:17 Ya kasance kafin dukan abu
Colossians1:18 Shi ne kuma kan ikkilisiya
Colossians1:19 Gama Allah ya ji daɗi yă sa dukan cikarsa ta kasance a cikin Kiristi
Colossians1:20 ta wurin Kiristi ne ya komar da kome zuwa ga kansa. Ya kawo salama ga abubuwan da suke ƙasa da abubuwan da suke sama
Colossians1:21 A dā kuna a ware da Allah
Colossians1:22 Amma Ɗansa ya zama mutum ya kuma mutu. Saboda haka Allah ya yi sulhu da ku
Colossians1:23 Sai ku ci gaba cikin bangaskiyarku
Colossians1:24 Yanzu
Colossians1:25 Na zama mai hidimar ikkilisiya bisa ga aikin nan da Allah ya ba ni amana saboda ku
Colossians1:26 Wannan magana da nake gaya muku asiri ne da yake a ɓoye tun zamanai masu yawa
Colossians1:27 Su ne Allah ya so yă sanar da yadda irin yalwar ɗaukakar asirin nan take a cikin al’ummai
Colossians1:28 Saboda haka ko’ina muka tafi
Colossians1:29 Don haka ne ina fama
Colossians2:1 Ina so ku san irin famar da nake yi saboda ku da kuma waɗanda suke a Lawodiseya
Colossians2:2 Manufata ita ce a ƙarfafa su su kuma zama ɗaya a cikin ƙauna. Ina so su kasance da cikakken ƙarfin hali domin suna da cikakken fahimtar asirin Allah
Colossians2:3 a cikinsa ne aka ɓoye dukkan dukiya ta hikima da ta sani.
Colossians2:4 Ina faɗa muku wannan ne don kada wani yă ruɗe ku da daɗin baki.
Colossians2:5 Gama ko da yake ba na nan tare da ku a cikin jiki
Colossians2:6 To
Colossians2:7 ku tsaya daram ku kuma ginu a cikinsa
Colossians2:8 Ku lura kada wani yă ruɗe ku da ilimin banza da wofi. Wannan koyarwa ta mutane ce kawai. Ta fito daga ikokin wannan duniya ne ba daga Kiristi ba.
Colossians2:9 Gama a cikin Kiristi cikin jiki dukkan cikar Allahntaka take tabbata
Colossians2:10 an kuma mai da ku cikakku a cikin Kiristi
Colossians2:11 A cikinsa ne kuma aka yi muku kaciya
Colossians2:12 Da yake an binne ku tare da shi cikin baftisma haka kuma aka tashe ku tare da shi ta wurin bangaskiyarku a cikin ikon Allah
Colossians2:13 Kun zama matattu saboda ku masu zunubi ne kuma saboda halin zunubanku aka ware. Sa’an nan Allah ya sa kuka rayu tare da Kiristi. Ya gafarta mana dukan zunubanmu.
Colossians2:14 Ya soke rubutacciyar doka tare da ƙa’idodinta
Colossians2:15 Bayan ya ƙwace makaman ikoki da hukumomi
Colossians2:16 Saboda haka kada ku bar wani yă shari’anta ku a kan abin da kuke ci ko sha
Colossians2:17 Waɗannan su ne hoton abubuwan da za su zo; amma Kiristi ne ainihinsu.
Colossians2:18 Kada ku yarda wani yă ɓata ku
Colossians2:19 Ya yanke dangantaka da Kiristi wanda yake kai
Colossians2:20 Kun mutu tare da Kiristi. Yanzu ƙa’idodin wannan duniya ba su da iko a kanku. Don me kuke zama har yanzu kamar ku nasu ne? Kuna biyayya da umarnansu cewa
Colossians2:21 “Kada ka kama! Kada ka ɗanɗana! Kada ka taɓa”?
Colossians2:22 Irin waɗannan dokoki suna magana a kan abubuwan da ba sa daɗewa. Su ayyukan mutane ne
Colossians2:23 Yin biyayya da irin waɗannan ƙa’idodi za su yi kamar su ne abu mafi kyau da za a yi. Sukan yi kamar suna sa a ƙaunaci Allah sosai a kuma kasance da sauƙinkai a kuma kasance da kamunkai. Amma ba su da wani iko a kan sha’awace-sha’awacenmu.

Colossians3:11 A wannan sabuwar rayuwa babu bambanci ko kai mutumin Al’ummai ne ko mutumin Yahuda
Colossians3:12 Da yake Allah ya mai da ku zaɓaɓɓu
Colossians3:13 Ku riƙa yin haƙuri da juna kuna kuma gafarta wa juna duk wani laifin da wani ya yi muku. Ku gafarta kamar yadda Ubangiji ya gafarce ku.
Colossians3:14 Fiye da waɗannan duka

Colossians4:1 Masu bayi
Colossians4:2 Ku nace da yin addu’a

Colossians4:6 Bari maganarku kullum ta zama da ladabi da kuma daɗin ji

Colossians4:17 Ku faɗa wa Arkiffus yă tabbata ya ƙarasa aikin da ya karɓa cikin Ubangiji.
Colossians4:18 Ni Bulus ne nake rubuta muku wannan gaisuwa da hannuna. Ku tuna da sarƙoƙina. Alherin Allah yă kasance tare da ku.
1Thessalonians1:1 Bulus
1Thessalonians1:2 Kullum muna gode wa Allah dominku duka
1Thessalonians1:3 Muna tunawa da aikinku ba fasawa a gaban Allah da Ubanmu ta wurin bangaskiya
1Thessalonians1:4 Gama mun sani
1Thessalonians1:5 domin bishararmu ba tă zo gare ku da kalmomi kawai ba
1Thessalonians1:6 Har kuka zama masu koyi da mu da kuma Ubangiji; duk da tsananin wahala
1Thessalonians1:7 Ta haka kuwa kuka zama gurbi ga dukan masu bi a Makidoniya da Akayya.
1Thessalonians1:8 Saƙon Ubangiji ya fito daga gare ku ne ba a Makidoniya da Akayya kaɗai ba bangaskiyarku ga Allah ta zama sananne ko’ina. Saboda haka ba ma bukata mu faɗa wani abu a kai
1Thessalonians1:9 gama su kansu su suke ba da labari irin karɓar da kuka yi mana. Suna faɗin yadda kuka juyo ga Allah daga gumaka don ku bauta wa Allah rayayye da kuma na gaskiya
1Thessalonians1:10 ku kuma jira dawowar Ɗansa daga sama
1Thessalonians2:1 Kun sani
1Thessalonians2:2 Mun riga mun sha wahala
1Thessalonians2:3 Gama roƙon da muke yi bai fito daga kuskure ko munafunci ba
1Thessalonians2:4 A maimako haka
1Thessalonians2:5 Kun san ba ma taɓa yin daɗin baki ko mu yi ƙoƙarin kasance da halin kwaɗayin da muke ɓoyewa
1Thessalonians2:6 Ba ma neman yabo daga wurin mutane
1Thessalonians2:7 amma muka kasance masu sauƙinkai a cikinku
1Thessalonians2:8 Muka ƙaunace ku ƙwarai har muka ji daɗin bayyana muku
1Thessalonians2:9 Ba shakka kuna iya tunawa
1Thessalonians2:10 Ku shaidu ne
1Thessalonians2:11 Gama kun san cewa mun bi da kowannenku yadda mahaifi yakan yi da ’ya’yansa
1Thessalonians2:12 muna ƙarfafa ku
1Thessalonians2:13 Muna kuma gode wa Allah ba fasawa domin
1Thessalonians2:14 Gama ku
1Thessalonians2:15 waɗanda suka kashe Ubangiji Yesu da annabawa suka kuma kore mu. Ba sa yin aikin da Allah yake so
1Thessalonians2:16 suna ƙoƙarin hana mu yin magana ga Al’ummai don kada su sami ceto. Ta haka kullum suke ƙara tara tsibin zunubansu. Fushin Allah ya aukar musu a ƙarshe.
1Thessalonians2:17 Amma
1Thessalonians2:18 Gama mun so mu zo wurinku
1Thessalonians2:19 Gama mene ne begenmu
1Thessalonians2:20 Tabbatacce
1Thessalonians3:1 Saboda haka da muka kāsa daurewa
1Thessalonians3:2 Muka aiki Timoti
1Thessalonians3:3 don kada kowa yă raunana ta wurin waɗannan gwaje-gwajen. Kun sani sarai cewa an ƙaddara mu don waɗannan.
1Thessalonians3:4 Gaskiyar ita ce
1Thessalonians3:5 Saboda wannan
1Thessalonians3:6 Amma ga shi yanzu Timoti ya dawo mana daga wurinku ya kuma kawo labari mai daɗi game da bangaskiyarku da kuma ƙaunarku. Ya faɗa mana yadda kullum kuke da tunani mai kyau a kanmu
1Thessalonians3:7 Saboda haka ’yan’uwa
1Thessalonians3:8 Gama yanzu tabbatacce muna da rai
1Thessalonians3:9 Wace irin godiya ce za mu yi wa Allah saboda ku a kan dukan farin cikin da muke da shi a gaban Allahnmu ta dalilinku?
1Thessalonians3:10 Dare da rana muna addu’a da himma domin mu sāke ganinku
1Thessalonians3:11 Yanzu bari Allahnmu da Ubanmu kansa da kuma Ubangijinmu Yesu yă shirya mana hanya mu zo wurinku.
1Thessalonians3:12 Ubangiji yă sa ƙaunarku ta ƙaru ta kuma yalwata ga juna da kuma ga kowa
1Thessalonians3:13 Bari yă ƙarfafa zukatanku har ku zama marasa aibi da kuma tsarkaka a gaban Allahnmu da Ubanmu sa’ad da Ubangijimmu Yesu ya dawo tare da dukan tsarkakansa.
1Thessalonians4:1 A ƙarshe
1Thessalonians4:2 Gama kun san umarnan da muka ba ku ta wurin ikon Ubangiji Yesu.
1Thessalonians4:3 Nufin Allah ne a tsarkake ku
1Thessalonians4:4 don kowannenku yă koya yadda zai ƙame kansa a hanyar da take mai tsarki
1Thessalonians4:5 ba cikin muguwar sha’awa kamar ta marasa bangaskiya
1Thessalonians4:6 cikin wannan al’amari kuwa kada wani yă yi wa ɗan’uwansa laifi ko yă cuce shi. Ubangiji zai hukunta mutane saboda dukan irin waɗannan zunubai
1Thessalonians4:7 Gama Allah bai kira mu ga zaman marasa tsarki ba
1Thessalonians4:8 Saboda haka
1Thessalonians4:9 Yanzu kuwa game da ƙaunar ’yan’uwa
1Thessalonians4:10 Gaskiyar kuwa ita ce
1Thessalonians4:11 Ku mai da wannan burinku na yi natsattsiyar rayuwa
1Thessalonians4:12 don rayuwanku ta kullum ta zama da mutunci ga waɗanda suke na waje don kuma kada ku dogara a kan kowa.
1Thessalonians4:13 ’Yan’uwa
1Thessalonians4:14 Mun gaskata cewa Yesu ya mutu ya tashi kuma daga matattu
1Thessalonians4:15 Bisa ga maganar Ubangiji kansa
1Thessalonians4:16 Gama Ubangiji kansa zai sauko daga sama
1Thessalonians4:17 Bayan haka
1Thessalonians4:18 Saboda haka ku ƙarfafa juna da waɗannan kalmomi.
1Thessalonians5:1 To
1Thessalonians5:2 gama kun sani sarai cewa ranar Ubangiji za tă zo kamar ɓarawo da dare.
1Thessalonians5:3 Yayinda mutane suke cewa
1Thessalonians5:4 Amma ku
1Thessalonians5:5 Dukanku ’ya’yan haske ne da kuma ’ya’yan rana. Mu ba mutanen dare ko na duhu ba ne.
1Thessalonians5:6 Saboda haka fa
1Thessalonians5:7 Gama masu barci
1Thessalonians5:8 Amma da yake mu na rana ne
1Thessalonians5:9 Gama Allah bai naɗa mu don mu sha fushi ba
1Thessalonians5:10 Ya mutu saboda mu domin
1Thessalonians5:11 Saboda haka ku ƙarfafa juna ku kuma gina juna
1Thessalonians5:12 To
1Thessalonians5:13 Ku riƙe su da mutunci sosai cikin ƙauna saboda aikinsu. Ku yi zaman lafiya da juna.
1Thessalonians5:14 Muna kuma gargaɗe ku
1Thessalonians5:15 Ku tabbata cewa kada kowa yă rama mugunta da mugunta
1Thessalonians5:16 Ku riƙa farin ciki kullum;
1Thessalonians5:17 ku ci gaba da yin addu’a;
1Thessalonians5:18 ku yi godiya cikin kowane hali
1Thessalonians5:19 Kada ku danne aikin Ruhu.
1Thessalonians5:20 Kada ku rena annabci
1Thessalonians5:21 amma ku gwada kome
1Thessalonians5:22 ku ƙi kowace mugunta.
1Thessalonians5:23 Bari Allah da kansa
1Thessalonians5:24 Wannan wanda ya kira ku mai aminci ne zai kuwa aikata.
1Thessalonians5:25 ’Yan’uwa
1Thessalonians5:26 Ku gaggai da dukan ’yan’uwa da sumba mai tsarki.
1Thessalonians5:27 Na gama ku da Ubangiji ku sa a karanta wannan wasiƙa ga dukan ’yan’uwa.
1Thessalonians5:28 Alherin Ubangijinmu Yesu Kiristi yă kasance tare da ku.
2Thessalonians1:1 Bulus
2Thessalonians1:2 Alheri da salama daga Allah Uba da kuma Ubangiji Yesu Kiristi
2Thessalonians1:3 Dole kullum mu gode wa Allah saboda ku
2Thessalonians1:4 Saboda haka
2Thessalonians1:5 Dukan wannan yana tabbatar cewa hukuncin Allah daidai ne
2Thessalonians1:6 Allah mai adalci ne
2Thessalonians1:7 yă kuma sauƙaƙa muku ku da kuke wahala
2Thessalonians1:8 Zai hukunta waɗanda ba su san Allah ba da kuma waɗanda ba su yi biyayya da bisharar Ubangijinmu Yesu ba.
2Thessalonians1:9 Za a hukunta su da madawwamiyar hallaka a kuma kau da su daga gaban Ubangiji da kuma daga ɗaukakar ikonsa
2Thessalonians1:10 a ranar da zai dawo don a ɗaukaka shi a cikin mutanensa masu tsarki
2Thessalonians1:11 Sane da wannan
2Thessalonians1:12 Muna wannan addu’a don sunan Ubangijinmu Yesu yă sami ɗaukaka a cikinku
2Thessalonians2:1 Game da dawowar Ubangijinmu Yesu Kiristi da game da tattara mu gare shi
2Thessalonians2:2 kada ku yi saurin jijjiguwa ko kuwa hankalinku yă tashi ta wurin wani annabci
2Thessalonians2:3 Kada ku bar wani yă ruɗe ku ko ta yaya
2Thessalonians2:4 Zai yi gāba yă kuma ɗaukaka kansa a bisa kome da ya shafe sunan Allah
2Thessalonians2:5 Ba ku tuna ba cewa sa’ad da nake tare da ku nakan gaya muku waɗannan abubuwa?
2Thessalonians2:6 Yanzu kuwa kun san abin da yake hana shi
2Thessalonians2:7 Gama ikon asirin tawaye ya riga ya fara aiki; sai dai wannan da yake hana shi zai ci gaba da yin haka sai an kau da shi.
2Thessalonians2:8 Sa’an nan za a bayyana mai tawayen
2Thessalonians2:9 Zuwan mai tawayen nan zai zama ta wurin aikin Shaiɗan da aka bayyana cikin kowane irin ayyukan banmamaki
2Thessalonians2:10 da kuma cikin kowace irin muguntar da take ruɗin waɗanda suke hallaka. Sun hallaka ne domin sun ƙi su ƙaunaci gaskiya don su sami ceto.
2Thessalonians2:11 Saboda haka Allah zai aiko musu da babban ruɗu don su gaskata ƙarya
2Thessalonians2:12 don kuma a hukunta dukan waɗanda ba su gaskata gaskiyar ba sai dai suke jin daɗin mugunta.
2Thessalonians2:13 Amma dole kullum mu gode wa Allah dominku
2Thessalonians2:14 Ya kira ku ga wannan ta wurin bishararmu
2Thessalonians2:15 Saboda haka fa
2Thessalonians2:16 Ubangijinmu Yesu Kiristi kansa da kuma Allah Ubanmu
2Thessalonians2:17 yă ƙarfafa zukatanku yă kuma gina ku cikin kowane aikin nagari da kuma magana.
2Thessalonians3:1 A ƙarshe
2Thessalonians3:2 Ku kuma yi addu’a yadda za a cece mu daga mugayen mutane masu mugunta
2Thessalonians3:3 Ubangiji mai aminci ne
2Thessalonians3:4 Muna da tabbaci cikin Ubangiji cewa kuna bin umarnai da muka yi muku
2Thessalonians3:5 Bari Ubangiji yă bi da zukatanku ga ƙaunan nan ta Allah da kuma jimirin nan na Kiristi.
2Thessalonians3:6 A cikin sunan Ubangiji Yesu Kiristi
2Thessalonians3:7 Gama ku kanku kun san yadda ya kamata ku bi gurbinmu. Ba mu yi zaman banza sa’ad da muke tare da ku ba
2Thessalonians3:8 ba mu kuwa ci abincin kowa ba tare da ba mu biya ba. A maimakon haka
2Thessalonians3:9 Mun yi wannan
2Thessalonians3:10 Ko ma a sa’ad da muke tare da ku
2Thessalonians3:11 Mun ji cewa waɗansunku suna zaman banza. Ba sa aikin kome; sai shisshigi kurum.
2Thessalonians3:12 Irin waɗannan mutane muna ba da umarni muna kuma gargaɗe su cikin Ubangiji Yesu Kiristi su natsu su kuma nemi abincin da suke ci.
2Thessalonians3:13 Game da ku kuma ’yan’uwa
2Thessalonians3:14 In wani bai yi biyayya da umarninmu a wannan wasiƙa ba
2Thessalonians3:15 Duk da haka kada ku mai da shi abokin gāba
2Thessalonians3:16 Yanzu
2Thessalonians3:17 Ni
2Thessalonians3:18 Alherin Ubangijinmu Yesu Kiristi yă kasance tare da ku duka.
1Timothy1:1 Bulus
1Timothy1:2 Zuwa ga Timoti ɗana na gaske cikin bangaskiya. Alheri
1Timothy1:3 Kamar yadda na gargaɗe ka sa’ad da zan je Makidoniya
1Timothy1:4 ko su ba da kansu ga tatsuniyoyi da ƙididdigar asali marar iyaka. Waɗannan suna kawo faɗa a maimakon aikin Allah wanda yake ta wurin bangaskiya.
1Timothy1:5 Maƙasudin wannan umarnin dai ƙauna ce
1Timothy1:6 Waɗansu sun bauɗe daga waɗannan al’amura
1Timothy1:7 So suke su zama malaman doka
1Timothy1:8 Mun san cewa doka tana da kyau in an yi amfani da ita yadda ya kamata.
1Timothy1:9 Mun kuma san cewa an yi doka ba domin masu adalci ba sai dai masu tawaye
1Timothy1:10 da masu zina da kuma da maza masu kwana da maza
1Timothy1:11 da take bisa ga bishara mai ɗaukaka ta Allah mai albarka
1Timothy1:12 Na gode wa Kiristi Yesu Ubangijinmu
1Timothy1:13 Ko da yake a dā ni mai saɓo da mai tsanantawa da kuma mai rikici ne
1Timothy1:14 An zubo mini alherin Ubangijinmu a yalwace
1Timothy1:15 Ga wata magana tabbatacciya wadda ta cancanci cikakkiyar karɓa. Kiristi Yesu ya zo duniya domin ceton masu zunubi
1Timothy1:16 Amma saboda wannan dalilin ne aka nuna mini jinƙai domin ta wurina
1Timothy1:17 Bari girma da ɗaukaka su tabbata har abada abadin ga Sarki madawwami
1Timothy1:18 Timoti
1Timothy1:19 kana riƙe da bangaskiya da kuma lamiri mai kyau. Gama waɗansu mutane
1Timothy1:20 Cikinsu kuwa akwai Himenayus da Alekzanda
1Timothy2:1 Da farko dai
1Timothy2:2 da sarakuna da dukan masu mulki
1Timothy2:3 Wannan yana da kyau
1Timothy2:4 wanda yake so dukan mutane su sami ceto su kuma zo ga sanin gaskiya.
1Timothy2:5 Gama Allah ɗaya ne
1Timothy2:6 wanda ya ba da kansa fansa domin dukan mutane
1Timothy2:7 Don haka ne aka sa ni mai wa’azi
1Timothy2:8 Ina so maza a ko’ina su ɗaga hannuwansu masu tsarki cikin addu’a
1Timothy2:9 Ina kuma so mata su lura su yi wa kansu adon da ya cancanta
1Timothy2:10 sai dai su yi ayyuka masu kyan da suka dace da matan da suke masu bauta wa Allah.
1Timothy2:11 Ya kamata mace ta riƙa koyo cikin natsuwa da cikakkiyar biyayya.
1Timothy2:12 Ban ba mace izini ta koyar ko tă yi mulki a kan namiji ba; sai dai ta zauna shiru.
1Timothy2:13 Gama Adamu ne aka fara halitta
1Timothy2:14 Ba kuma Adamu ne aka yaudara ba; macen ce aka yaudara ta kuma zama mai zunubi.
1Timothy2:15 Amma mata Za tă sami ceto za su sami ceto ta wurin haihuwa
1Timothy3:1 Ga wata tabbatacciyar magana. In wani ya sa zuciyarsa a kan zama mai kula da ikkilisiya
1Timothy3:2 To
1Timothy3:3 ba mai buguwa ba
1Timothy3:4 Dole yă iya tafiyar da iyalinsa da kyau
1Timothy3:5 (In mutum bai san yadda zai tafiyar da iyalinsa ba
1Timothy3:6 Kada yă zama sabon tuba
1Timothy3:7 Dole kuma yă kasance da shaida mai kyau ga waɗanda suke na waje
1Timothy3:8 Haka masu hidima a cikin ikkilisiya; su ma
1Timothy3:9 Dole su riƙe asirin bangaskiya su kuma kasance da lamiri mai tsabta.
1Timothy3:10 Dole a fara gwada su tukuna; sa’an nan in ba a sami wani abin zargi game da su ba
1Timothy3:11 A haka kuma
1Timothy3:12 Dole mai hidimar ikkilisiya yă zama mijin mace guda dole kuma yă iya tafiyar da ’ya’yansa da kuma iyalinsa da kyau.
1Timothy3:13 Waɗanda suke hidima da kyau suna samar wa kansu kyakkyawan suna da kuma cikakken tabbatarwa a cikin bangaskiyarsu cikin Kiristi Yesu.
1Timothy3:14 Ko da yake ina sa zuciya zo wurinka nan ba da daɗewa ba
1Timothy3:15 in na yi jinkiri
1Timothy3:16 Ba shakka
1Timothy4:1 Ruhu a sarari ya faɗa cewa a kwanakin ƙarshe waɗansu za su watsar da bangaskiya su bi ruhohi masu ruɗu da kuma abubuwan da aljanu suke koyarwa.
1Timothy4:2 Irin koyarwan nan tana zuwa ne daga waɗansu munafukai maƙaryata
1Timothy4:3 Suna hana mutane yin aure suna kuma umarce su kada su ci waɗansu irin abinci
1Timothy4:4 Gama duk abin da Allah ya halitta yana da kyau
1Timothy4:5 domin an tsarkake shi ta wurin maganar Allah da kuma addu’a.
1Timothy4:6 In ka nuna wa ’yan’uwa waɗannan abubuwa
1Timothy4:7 Ka kiyaye kanka daga tatsuniyoyi na rashin tsoron Allah da labaru banza na tsofaffin mata; a maimako
1Timothy4:8 Gama horon jiki yana da amfani
1Timothy4:9 Wannan magana tabbatacciya ce wadda ta cancanci cikakkiyar karɓa.
1Timothy4:10 Saboda wannan kuwa muke wahala da kuma fama
1Timothy4:11 Ka umarta ka kuma koyar da waɗannan abubuwa.
1Timothy4:12 Kada ka bar wani yă rena ka domin kai matashi ne
1Timothy4:13 Kafin in zo
1Timothy4:14 Kada ka yi sakaci da baiwarka
1Timothy4:15 Ka yi ƙwazo cikin waɗannan batuttuwa; ka ba da kanka gaba ɗaya gare su
1Timothy4:16 Ka kula da rayuwarka da kuma koyarwarka da kyau. Ka daure a cikinsu
1Timothy5:1 Kada ka tsawata wa dattijo
1Timothy5:2 tsofaffin mata kuwa sai ka ce uwaye
1Timothy5:3 Ka girmama gwauraye waɗanda suke cikin bukata ta ainihi.
1Timothy5:4 Amma in gwauruwa tana da ’ya’ya ko jikoki
1Timothy5:5 Gwauruwa wadda ba ta da kowa da zai taimake ta
1Timothy5:6 Amma gwauruwar da take zaman jin daɗi
1Timothy5:7 Ka umarce su game da waɗannan abubuwa
1Timothy5:8 In wani bai kula da danginsa ba
1Timothy5:9 Kada a lasafta gwauruwa cikin jerin gwauraye sai ta wuce shekara sittin
1Timothy5:10 aka kuma santa sosai saboda ayyuka masu kyau
1Timothy5:11 Game da gwauraye masu ƙuruciya kuwa
1Timothy5:12 Ta haka suna jawo wa kansu hukunci
1Timothy5:13 Ban da haka
1Timothy5:14 Saboda haka ina ba wa gwauraye masu ƙuruciya shawara su yi aure
1Timothy5:15 Waɗansu dai sun riga sun bauɗe sun bi Shaiɗan.
1Timothy5:16 In mace mai bi tana da gwauraye a iyalinta
1Timothy5:17 Dattawan da suka bi da al’amuran ikkilisiya da kyau sun cancanci girmamawa ninki biyu
1Timothy5:18 Gama Nassi ya ce
1Timothy5:19 Kada ka saurari ƙara game da dattijo sai da shaidu biyu ko uku.
1Timothy5:20 Amman waɗannan dattawa waɗanda suke yin zunubi kuwa sai ka kwaɓe su a gaban jama’a
1Timothy5:21 Na gama ka da Allah
1Timothy5:22 Kada ka yi garajen ɗibiya hannuwa
1Timothy5:23 Ka daina shan ruwa kaɗai
1Timothy5:24 Zunuban waɗansu mutane a fili suke
1Timothy5:25 Haka ma ayyuka nagari a fili suke
1Timothy6:1 Duk waɗanda suke ƙarƙashin bauta
1Timothy6:2 Waɗanda suke da iyayengiji masu bi
1Timothy6:3 In wani yana koyarwar ƙarya bai kuma yarda da sahihiyar koyarwar Ubangijinmu Yesu Kiristi da kuma koyarwa ta tsoron Allah ba
1Timothy6:4 yana cike da girman kai bai kuma san kome ba. Yana da mugun halin son gardama da muhawwara game da kalmomin da suke kawo kishi
1Timothy6:5 da yawan tankiya tsakanin mutane masu mugun hali
1Timothy6:6 Amma bin Allah da gamsuwa riba ce mai yawa.
1Timothy6:7 Gama ba mu zo duniya da kome ba
1Timothy6:8 In dai muna da abinci da sutura
1Timothy6:9 Mutanen da suke son yin arziki sukan fāɗi cikin jarraba
1Timothy6:10 Gama son kuɗi shi ne tushen kowane irin mugun abu. Waɗansu mutane
1Timothy6:11 Amma kai
1Timothy6:12 Ka yi fama
1Timothy6:13 Na umarce ka
1Timothy6:14 ka kiyaye wannan umarni ba tare da wani aibi ko abin zargi ba har yă bayyanuwar Ubangijinmu Yesu Kiristi
1Timothy6:15 wanda Allah zai kawo a daidai lokaci
1Timothy6:16 wanda shi kaɗai ne marar mutuwa wanda kuma yake zaune cikin hasken da ba ya kusatuwa
1Timothy6:17 Ka umarci waɗanda suke da arziki a wannan duniya kada su ɗaga kai ko su sa begensu a kan dukiyar da ba ta da tabbaci
1Timothy6:18 Ka umarce su su yi nagarta
1Timothy6:19 Ta haka za su ajiye wa kansu dukiya a matsayin tushen mai ƙarfi don tsara mai zuwa
1Timothy6:20 Timoti
1Timothy6:21 wanda waɗansu suka furta kuma ta yin haka suka bauɗe daga bangaskiya. Alheri yă kasance tare da ku.
2Timothy1:1 Bulus
2Timothy1:2 Zuwa ga Timoti
2Timothy1:3 Na gode wa Allah wanda nake bauta wa
2Timothy1:4 Sa’ad da na tuna da hawayenka
2Timothy1:5 An tunashe ni da sahihiyar bangaskiyarka
2Timothy1:6 Saboda haka
2Timothy1:7 Gama Allah bai ba mu ruhun tsoro ba
2Timothy1:8 Saboda haka kada ka ji kunyar ba da shaida game da Ubangijinmu
2Timothy1:9 wanda ya cece mu ya kuma kira mu ga rayuwar tsarki ba saboda wani abin da muka yi ba sai dai saboda nufinsa da kuma alherinsa. An ba mu wannan alheri cikin Kiristi Yesu tun fil azal
2Timothy1:10 amma yanzu an bayyana ta ta wurin bayyanuwar Mai Cetonmu
2Timothy1:11 A wannan bishara ce
2Timothy1:12 Shi ya sa nake shan wahalar da nake sha. Duk da haka ba na jin kunya
2Timothy1:13 Abin da ka ji daga gare ni
2Timothy1:14 Ka kiyaye kyakkyawar ajiyan nan da aka danƙa maka amana
2Timothy1:15 Ka san cewa kowa a lardin Asiya ya juya mini baya
2Timothy1:16 Bari Ubangiji yă yi wa iyalin Onesiforus jinƙai
2Timothy1:17 A maimakon haka ma
2Timothy1:18 Bari Ubangiji yă sa yă sami jinƙai daga Ubangiji a wancan ranar! Ka sani sarai yadda ya taimake ni a hanyoyi dabam-dabam a Afisa.
2Timothy2:1 Kai kuma
2Timothy2:2 Abubuwan da ka ji na faɗa a gaban shaidu masu yawa kuwa ka danƙa wa amintattun mutane waɗanda su ma za su iya koya wa waɗansu.
2Timothy2:3 Ka jure wa shan wahala tare da mu kamar soja mai kyau na Kiristi Yesu.
2Timothy2:4 Ba wanda yake aikin soja da zai sa kansa a sha’anin mutumin da ba ya aikin soja
2Timothy2:5 Haka ma
2Timothy2:6 Manomi mai aiki sosai ya kamata yă zama na fari wajen samun rabon amfanin gona.
2Timothy2:7 Ka yi tunani a kan abin da nake faɗi
2Timothy2:8 Ka tuna da Yesu Kiristi
2Timothy2:9 wadda nake shan wahala har ga daurin sarƙa kamar mai laifi. Amma Maganar Allah ba a daure take ba.
2Timothy2:10 Saboda haka nake jure kome saboda zaɓaɓɓu
2Timothy2:11 Ga wata magana tabbatacciya
2Timothy2:12 in muka jimre
2Timothy2:13 in ba mu da aminci
2Timothy2:14 Ka riƙa tuna masu da haka
2Timothy2:15 Ka yi iyakacin ƙoƙarinka ka gabatar da kanka a gaban Allah a matsayin wanda aka amince da shi
2Timothy2:16 Ka yi nesa da maganganun banza na rashin tsoron Allah
2Timothy2:17 Koyarwarsu za tă bazu kamar ruɓaɓɓen gyambo. A cikinsu akwai Himenayus da Filetus
2Timothy2:18 waɗanda suka bauɗe daga gaskiya. Suna cewa tashin matattu ya riga ya faru
2Timothy2:19 Duk da haka
2Timothy2:20 A babban gida akwai kayayyakin da ba na zinariya da na azurfa kaɗai ba
2Timothy2:21 In mutum ya tsabtacce kansa daga na farkon zai zama kayan aikin hidima mai daraja
2Timothy2:22 Ka yi nesa da mugayen sha’awace-sha’awace na ƙuruciya
2Timothy2:23 Kada wani abu yă haɗa ka da gardandamin banza da wofi
2Timothy2:24 Bai kamata bawan Ubangiji yă zama mai neman faɗa ba; a maimako
2Timothy2:25 Waɗanda suke gāba da shi kuwa dole yă yi musu gargaɗi cikin hankali
2Timothy2:26 su kuma dawo cikin hankulansu su kuɓuta daga tarkon Iblis
2Timothy3:1 Amma fa ka san wannan
2Timothy3:2 Mutane za su zama masu son kansu
2Timothy3:3 marasa ƙauna
2Timothy3:4 masu cin amana
2Timothy3:5 suna riƙe da siffofin ibada
2Timothy3:6 Irin su ne suke saɗaɗawa su shiga gidaje suna rinjayar mata marasa ƙarfin hali
2Timothy3:7 kullum suna koyo amma ba sa taɓa iya yarda da gaskiya.

Hebrews9:1 Alkawarin farko ya ƙunshi ƙa’idodi don sujada da kuma tsattsarkan wuri a duniya.
Hebrews9:2 An kafa tabanakul. A cikin ɗakinsa na farko akwai wurin ajiye fitila
Hebrews9:3 Sa’an nan akwai labule
Hebrews9:4 wanda yake da bagaden zinariya na turare da kuma akwatin alkawarin da aka dalaye da zinariya. A cikin akwatin alkawarin akwai tulun zinariya mai Manna a ciki
Hebrews9:5 A bisa akwatin alkawarin kuwa akwai kerubobi na Ɗaukaka
Hebrews9:6 Sa’ad da aka shirya kome haka
Hebrews9:7 Amma babban firist ne kaɗai yakan shiga ɗaki na ciki-ciki
Hebrews9:8 Ta haka Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya nuna cewa ba a riga an bayyana hanyar shiga Wuri Mafi Tsarki ba tukuna
Hebrews9:9 Wannan ma yana da ma’ana wa mutane a yau. Ya nuna cewa ba za mu iya wanke lamirinmu ta wurin miƙa baye-baye da hadayu ba.
Hebrews9:10 Waɗannan ƙa’idodi sun shafi sha’anin abinci da abin sha ne kawai da kuma ƙa’idodi tsarkake kanmu. Dokoki game da abubuwa na waje da ake amfani da su za su kasance ne sai lokacin ya yi da za a kawo abu mafi kyau.
Hebrews9:11 Sa’ad da Kiristi ya zo a matsayin babban firist na kyawawan abubuwan da suka riga suka kasance a nan
Hebrews9:12 Bai shiga ta wurin jinin awaki da na maruƙa ba; amma ya shiga Wuri Mafi Tsarki sau ɗaya tak ta wurin jininsa
Hebrews9:13 In har akan yayyafa jinin awaki da na bijimai da kuma tokar karsanar a kan waɗanda suke marasa tsabta bisa ga al’ada
Hebrews9:14 balle jinin Kiristi
Hebrews9:15 Saboda haka Kiristi shi ne matsakancin sabon alkawari

Hebrews9:17 domin alkawarin gādo yana aiki ne kawai bayan mai yinsa ya mutu
Hebrews9:18 Shi ya sa alkawari na farko bai fara aiki ba sai da aka zub da jini.

Hebrews9:22 Tabbatacce
Hebrews9:23 Waɗannan abubuwa hotuna ne kawai na abin da yake a sama
Hebrews9:24 Gama Kiristi bai shiga wani wuri tsattsarka da mutum ya yi ba
Hebrews9:25 Bai kuwa shiga sama domin yă yi ta miƙa kansa a kai a kai
Hebrews9:26 Da a ce haka ne
Hebrews9:27 Kamar dai yadda aka ƙaddara wa mutum yă mutu sau ɗaya
Hebrews9:28 haka aka miƙa Kiristi hadaya sau ɗaya domin yă ɗauke zunuban mutane masu yawa; zai kuma bayyana sau na biyu
Hebrews10:1 Dokar
Hebrews10:2 Da a ce za tă iya
Hebrews10:3 Amma waɗancan hadayu abin tunawa da zunubai ne na kowace shekara
Hebrews10:4 domin ba zai taɓa yiwuwa jinin bijimai da na awaki yă kawar da zunubai ba.
Hebrews10:5 Saboda haka
Hebrews10:6 hadayun ƙonawa da kuma hadayun zunubi ba ka ji daɗin.
Hebrews10:7 Sai na ce
Hebrews10:8 Da farko ya ce
Hebrews10:9 Sa’an nan ya ce
Hebrews10:10 Kuma bisa ga wannan nufi
Hebrews10:11 Kowace rana kowane firist yakan tsaya yin hidimar ibadarsa; sau da sau yakan miƙa hadayu iri ɗaya
Hebrews10:12 Amma da Kiristi ya miƙa hadaya ɗaya ta dukan lokaci saboda zunubai
Hebrews10:13 Tun daga lokacin nan yana jira a mai da abokan gābansa matashin ƙafafunsa
Hebrews10:14 gama ta wurin hadayan nan guda ɗaya ya kammala har abada waɗanda ake tsarkake.
Hebrews10:15 Ruhu Mai Tsarki ma ya yi mana shaida game da wannan. Da farko ya ce
Hebrews10:16 “Wannan shi ne alkawarin da zan yi da su bayan wannan lokaci
Hebrews10:17 Sai ya ƙara da cewa
Hebrews10:18 In an gafarta zunubai
Hebrews10:19 Saboda haka
Hebrews10:20 ta wurin sabuwa
Hebrews10:21 da yake kuma muna da babban firist mai mulkin gidan Allah
Hebrews10:22 bari mu matso kusa da Allah da zuciya mai gaskiya da kuma cikakken tabbaci mai zuwa ta wurin bangaskiya. Bari mu bar zukatan da tsabta
Hebrews10:23 Bari mu tsaya da ƙarfi a kan ga begen da muka ce namu ne
Hebrews10:24 Bari kuma mu yi tunani a kan yadda za mu gargaɗe juna ga ƙauna da kuma ayyuka nagari.
Hebrews10:25 Kada mu daina taruwa kamar yadda waɗansu suka saba
Hebrews10:26 Ba wata hadayar da za a yi don mutanen da suka yanke shawara su yi ci gaba da yin zunubi da gangan bayan sun sami sanin gaskiya.
Hebrews10:27 A maimakon haka za su kasance da babban fargabar hukunci da kuma ta ƙunar wuta wadda za tă cinye abokan gāban Allah.
Hebrews10:28 Duk wanda ya ƙi ya kiyaye dokar Musa akan kashe shi ba tausayi
Hebrews10:29 Wane irin hukunci mai tsanani ne kuke tsammani zai dace da mutumin da ya nuna rashin bangirma ga Ɗan Allah
Hebrews10:30 Gama mun san shi
Hebrews10:31 Abu mai matuƙar bantsoro ne a fāɗa cikin hannuwan Allah mai rai.
Hebrews10:32 Ku tuna da kwanakin nan da suka wuce bayan kun sami haske
Hebrews10:33 Wani lokaci a fili an tsananta muku aka kuma zage ku aka kuma tsananta muku; a wani lokaci kuma kuka tsaya tare da waɗanda aka yi musu haka.
Hebrews10:34 Kuka ji tausayin waɗanda suke cikin kurkuku
Hebrews10:35 Saboda haka kada ku yar da tabbacinku; za a sāka muku a yalwace.
Hebrews10:36 Kuna bukata ku jimre don sa’ad da kuka aikata nufin Allah
Hebrews10:37 Gama
Hebrews10:38 Amma
Hebrews10:39 Amma mu ba na waɗanda suke ja da baya
Hebrews11:1 Bangaskiya ita ce kasance tabbacin abin da muke bege a kai da kuma tabbatar da abin da ba mu gani ba.
Hebrews11:2 Abin da aka yabi kakanni na dā a kai ke nan.
Hebrews11:3 Ta wurin bangaskiya ne muka fahimci cewa an halicci duniya bisa ga umarnin Allah
Hebrews11:4 Ta wurin bangaskiya Habila ya miƙa wa Allah hadayar da ta fi wadda Kayinu ya miƙa. Ta wurin bangaskiya aka yabe shi cewa shi mai adalci ne
Hebrews11:5 Ta wurin bangaskiya ne aka ɗauki Enok daga wannan rayuwa
Hebrews11:6 In ba tare da bangaskiya ba kuwa
Hebrews11:7 Ta wurin bangaskiya Nuhu
Hebrews11:8 Ta wurin bangaskiya ne Ibrahim
Hebrews11:9 Ta wurin bangaskiya ya yi zama a ƙasar da aka yi masa alkawari kamar baƙo a baƙuwar ƙasa; ya zauna a tentuna
Hebrews11:10 Gama yana zuba ido ga birnin nan mai tushe
Hebrews11:11 Ta wurin bangaskiya Ibrahim
Hebrews11:12 Saboda haka
Hebrews11:13 Duk mutanen nan suna cikin bangaskiya sa’ad da suka mutu. Ba su kuwa karɓi abubuwan da aka yi alkawari ba; sun dai hango su suka kuma marabce su daga nesa. Suka kuma amince cewa su baƙi ne
Hebrews11:14 Mutane masu faɗin irin abubuwan nan sun nuna cewa suna neman ƙasar da take tasu.
Hebrews11:15 Da a ce suna tunanin ƙasar da suka bari a baya
Hebrews11:16 A maimako
Hebrews11:17 Ta wurin bangaskiya Ibrahim
Hebrews11:18 ko da yake Allah ya ce masa
Hebrews11:19 Ibrahim ya yi tunani cewa Allah yana iya tā da matattu
Hebrews11:20 Ta wurin bangaskiya ne Ishaku ya albarkaci Yaƙub da Isuwa game da nan gabansu.
Hebrews11:21 Ta wurin bangaskiya ne Yaƙub
Hebrews11:22 Ta wurin bangaskiya ne Yusuf
Hebrews11:23 Ta wurin bangaskiya ne iyayen Musa suka ɓoye shi har wata uku bayan haihuwarsa
Hebrews11:24 Ta wurin bangaskiya ne Musa
Hebrews11:25 Ya zaɓa yă sha wahala tare da mutanen Allah
Hebrews11:26 Ya ɗauki wulaƙancin da yake sha saboda Kiristi ya fi dukiyar Masar daraja
Hebrews11:27 Ta wurin bangaskiya ya bar Masar
Hebrews11:28 Ta wurin bangaskiya ya kiyaye Bikin Ƙetarewa ya kuma yayyafa jini
Hebrews11:29 Ta wurin bangaskiya ne mutane suka bi ta cikin Jan Teku
Hebrews11:30 Ta wurin bangaskiya ne katangar Yeriko ta rushe
Hebrews11:31 Ta wurin bangaskiya ne ba a kashe Rahab karuwan nan
Hebrews11:32 Me kuma zan faɗa? Ba ni da lokacin da zan ba da labari a kan Gideyon
Hebrews11:33 waɗanda ta wurin bangaskiya ne suka ci nasara a kan mulkoki
Hebrews11:34 suka kashe harshen wuta
Hebrews11:35 Mata suka karɓi ƙaunatattunsu da aka sāke tasar daga matattu. Aka azabtar da yawancin mutanen nan
Hebrews11:36 Waɗansu suka sha ba’a da bulala
Hebrews11:37 Aka jajjefe su da duwatsu; aka raba su biyu da zarto; aka kashe su da takobi. Suka yi ta yawo saye da fatun tumaki da na awaki
Hebrews11:38 duniya ba tă ma cancanci su zauna a cikinta ba. Suka yi ta yawo a cikin hamada da a kan duwatsu
Hebrews11:39 Waɗannan duka an yabe su saboda bangaskiyarsu
Hebrews11:40 Allah ya shirya mana wani abu mafi kyau. Kuma bai so su kai ga maƙasudin bangaskiyarsu ba sai tare da mu.
Hebrews12:1 Saboda haka
Hebrews12:2 Bari mu kafa idanunmu a kan Yesu
Hebrews12:3 Ku lura da wannan wanda ya jure da irin hamayyan nan daga masu zunubi
Hebrews12:4 Cikin famanku da zunubi
Hebrews12:5 Kun kuma manta da kalmar ƙarfafawan nan da tana ce da ku ’ya’ya
Hebrews12:6 domin Ubangiji yakan hori waɗanda yake ƙauna
Hebrews12:7 Ku jimre shan wahala a matsayin horo; Allah yana yi da ku kamar ’ya’ya. Gama wane ɗa ne mahaifinsa ba ya horonsa?
Hebrews12:8 In ba a hore ku ba (kowa kuwa yakan sami horo)
Hebrews12:9 Ban da haka ma
Hebrews12:10 Ubanninmu sun hore mu na ɗan lokaci yadda suka ga ya fi kyau; amma Allah yakan hore mu don amfaninmu
Hebrews12:11 Babu horon da yake da daɗi a lokacin da ake yinsa
Hebrews12:12 Saboda haka
Hebrews12:13 “Ku shirya hanyoyi marasa gargaɗa saboda ƙafafunku
Hebrews12:14 Ku yi iyakacin ƙoƙari ku yi zaman lafiya da kowa
Hebrews12:15 Ku lura fa kada wani yă kāsa samun alherin Allah
Hebrews12:16 Ku lura kada wani yă zama mai fasikanci
Hebrews12:17 Daga baya
Hebrews12:18 Ba ku zo ga Dutsen Sinai wanda ana iya taɓawa ba
Hebrews12:19 ko busar ƙaho
Hebrews12:20 domin ba su iya jimrewa da abin da aka umarta cewa
Hebrews12:21 Ganin wannan abu da matuƙar bantsoro yake
Hebrews12:22 Sai dai kun zo ne ga Dutsen Sihiyona
Hebrews12:23 kun zo ga ikkilisiyar ɗan fari
Hebrews12:24 Kun zo ga Yesu
Hebrews12:25 Ku lura fa kada ku ƙi wanda yake magana. Gama in su ba su tsira sa’ad da suka ƙi wanda ya gargaɗe su a wannan duniya ba
Hebrews12:26 A lokacin nan muryarsa ta jijjiga duniya
Hebrews12:27 Wannan magana “sau ɗayan nan” sun nuna
Hebrews12:28 Saboda haka
Hebrews12:29 gama “Allahnmu wuta ne mai cinyewa.”
Hebrews13:1 Ku ci gaba da ƙaunar juna kamar ’yan’uwa.
Hebrews13:2 Kada ku manta da yin alheri ga baƙi
Hebrews13:3 Ku riƙa tunawa da waɗanda suke a kurkuku kamar tare kuke a kurkuku
Hebrews13:4 Aure yă zama abin girmamawa ga kowa
Hebrews13:5 Ku kiyaye kanku daga yawan son kuɗi
Hebrews13:6 Saboda haka muna iya fitowa gabagadi
Hebrews13:7 Ku tuna da shugabanninku
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Kiristi ba ya sākewa
Hebrews13:9 Kada a ɗauke muku hankali da sababbin koyarwa dabam-dabam. Yana da kyau zukatanmu su ƙarfafa ta wurin alheri
Hebrews13:10 Muna da bagade inda firistocin da suka yi hidima a tabanakul ba su da izini su ci.
Hebrews13:11 Babban firist yakan ɗauki jinin dabbobi yă shiga cikin Wuri Mafi Tsarki a matsayin hadaya ta zunubi
Hebrews13:12 Haka ma Yesu ya sha wahala a bayan gari don yă tsarkake mutane ta wurin jininsa.
Hebrews13:13 Saboda haka
Hebrews13:14 Gama a nan ba mu da dawwammamen birni
Hebrews13:15 Saboda haka
Hebrews13:16 Kada kuma ku manta yin aikin nagari da kuma taimakon waɗansu
Hebrews13:17 Ku yi wa shugabanninku biyayya ku kuma miƙa kanku ga ikonsu. Suna lura da ku kuma za su ba da lissafi a gaban Allah. Saboda haka kada ku sa su yi fushi saboda aikinsu
Hebrews13:18 Ku yi mana addu’a. Mun tabbata cewa muna da lamiri mai kyau
Hebrews13:19 Ni musamman
Hebrews13:20 Bari Allah na salama
Hebrews13:21 yă kintsa ku da kowane abu mai kyau domin aikata nufinsa
Hebrews13:22 ’Yan’uwa
Hebrews13:23 Ina so ku san cewa an saki ɗan’uwanmu Timoti. In ya iso da wuri
Hebrews13:24 Ku gai da dukan shugabanninku da kuma dukan mutanen Allah. Waɗanda suke Italiya suna gaishe ku.
Hebrews13:25 Alheri yă kasance da ku duka.
James1:1 Yaƙub
James1:2 Ku ɗauki wannan da farin ciki mai tsabta
James1:3 domin kun san cewa gwajin bangaskiyarku yakan haifi daurewa.
James1:4 Dole daurewa ta kammala aikinta don ku zama balagaggu da kuma cikakku
James1:5 In waninku ya rasa hikima
James1:6 Amma sa’ad da ya roƙa
James1:7 Kada irin wannan mutum yă yi tsammani zai sami wani abu daga Ubangiji;
James1:8 shi mai zuciya biyu ne
James1:9 Bari ɗan’uwan da yake cikin halin ƙasƙanci yă yi taƙama a matsayinsa na ɗaukaka.
James1:10 Amma wanda yake mai arziki
James1:11 Gama in rana ta fito ta yi zafi mai tsanani sai ta sa tsiro yă yanƙwane tsiro; furensa yă kakkaɓe
James1:12 Mai albarka ne mutumin da yake daurewa cikin gwaji
James1:13 Sa’ad da aka jarrabci mutum
James1:14 amma akan jarrabce kowane mutum sa’ad da muguwar sha’awarsa ta janye shi ta kuma rinjaye shi.
James1:15 Sa’an nan
James1:16 Kada a ruɗe ku
James1:17 Kowane abu mai kyau da kuma kowace cikakkiyar kyauta daga sama suke
James1:18 Ya zaɓa yă haife mu ta wurin kalmar gaskiya
James1:19 ’Yan’uwana ƙaunatattu
James1:20 gama fushin mutum ba ya kawo rayuwar adalcin da Allah yake so.
James1:21 Saboda haka
James1:22 Kada ku zama masu ji kawai
James1:23 Duk wanda yake ji magana ne kawai
James1:24 bayan ya kalli kansa
James1:25 Amma duk mai duba cikakkiyar ƙa’idan nan ta ’yanci
James1:26 In wani ya ɗauki kansa mai addini ne duk da haka bai ƙame harshensa ba
James1:27 Addinin da Allah Ubanmu ya yarda da shi a matsayin mai tsabta da kuma marar aibi shi ne

James2:4 ashe
James2:5 Ku saurara
James2:6 Ga shi kun wulaƙanta matalauta. Ashe
James2:7 Ba su ba ne suke ɓata sunan nan mai martaba wanda aka san ku da shi ba?
James2:8 In fa kun kiyaye dokan nan ta mulki wadda take cikin Nassi mai cewa
James2:9 Amma in kuka nuna bambanci
James2:10 Gama duk wanda ya kiyaye dukan doka amma ya yi tuntuɓe a kan abu ɗaya kaɗai
James2:11 Gama shi da ya ce

James2:13 gama za a yi wa duk wanda bai nuna jinƙai ba hukunci babu jinƙai. Jinƙai yakan yi nasara a kan hukunci!
James2:14 Wanda amfani ne
James2:15 A ce wani ɗan’uwa ko ’yar’uwa ba shi da riguna ko abincin yini
James2:16 sai waninku yă ce masa

James2:18 Amma wani zai ce

James2:22 Ai
James2:23 Aka kuma cika nassin nan da ya ce

James2:25 Ta haka kuma ashe
James2:26 Kamar yadda jikin da babu ruhu matacce ne
James3:1 Kada yawancinku su so ɗaukan kansu a matsayin malamai
James3:2 Dukanmu mukan yi tuntuɓe a hanyoyi dabam-dabam. In wani bai taɓa yin kuskure a cikin maganarsa ba
James3:3 Sa’ad da muka sa linzamai a bakunan dawakai don mu sa su yi mana biyayya
James3:4 Ko kuwa misali
James3:5 Haka ma harshe yake
James3:6 Harshe ma wuta ne! A cikin duk gaɓoɓinmu
James3:7 Kowace irin dabba
James3:8 amma ba mutumin da zai iya ya sarrafa harshe. Mugu ne marar hutu
James3:9 Da harshe mukan yabi Ubangijinmu da kuma Ubanmu
James3:10 Daga wannan baki guda yabo da la’ana suke fitowa. ’Yan’uwana
James3:11 Ruwa mai kyau da kuma ruwan gishiri zai iya fito daga maɓulɓula ɗaya?
James3:12 ’Yan’uwana
James3:13 Wane ne mai hikima da fahimta a cikinku? Bari yă nuna ta ta wurin rayuwarsa mai kyau
James3:14 Amma in kuna cike da mugun kishi da kuma sonkai a cikin zukatanku
James3:15 Irin wannan “hikima” ba daga sama ta sauko ba
James3:16 Gama inda akwai kishi da sonkai
James3:17 Amma hikimar da ta zo daga sama da fari tana da tsabta gaba ɗaya; sa’an nan mai ƙaunar salama ce
James3:18 Masu salama da suke shuki cikin salama sukan girbe adalci.

James5:4 Ga shi! Zaluncin da kuka yi na hakkin ma’aikatan gonakinku yana ta ƙara. Kukan masu girbi ya kai kunnuwan Ubangiji Maɗaukaki.
James5:5 Kun yi rayuwar jin daɗi a duniya kuna ci kuna sha na ganin dama. Kun ciyar da kanku kun yi ƙiba don ranar yanka.

James5:14 Akwai waninku da yake ciwo? Ya kamata yă kira dattawan ikkilisiya su yi masa addu’a
James5:15 Addu’ar da aka yi cikin bangaskiya

James5:18 Ya sāke yin addu’a

1Peter1:1 Bitrus
1Peter1:2 waɗanda aka zaɓa bisa ga rigyasanin Allah Uba
1Peter1:3 Yabo ya tabbata ga Allah Uban Ubangijinmu Yesu Kiristi! Cikin jinƙansa mai girma ya ba mu sabuwar haihuwa cikin bege mai rai ta wurin tashin Yesu Kiristi daga matattu
1Peter1:4 da kuma cikin gādon da ba zai taɓa lalacewa
1Peter1:5 ku waɗanda ta wurin bangaskiya ake kiyayewa ta wurin ikon Allah har yă zuwa ceton da yake a shirye da za a bayyana a ƙarshen lokaci.
1Peter1:6 A kan wannan kuke cike da farin ciki ƙwarai
1Peter1:7 Wannan kuwa domin a tabbatar da sahihancin bangaskiyarku ne
1Peter1:8 Ko da yake ba ku taɓa ganinsa ba
1Peter1:9 gama kuna samun sakamakon bangaskiyarku
1Peter1:10 Game da ceton nan
1Peter1:11 suna ƙoƙari su san lokaci da kuma yanayin da Ruhun Kiristi da yake cikinsu yana nunawa sa’ad da ya yi faɗi a kan wahalolin Kiristi da kuma ɗaukaka da za tă bi.
1Peter1:12 Aka bayyana musu cewa ba kansu ne suke bauta wa ba sai ku
1Peter1:13 Saboda haka
1Peter1:14 Kamar ’ya’ya masu biyayya
1Peter1:15 Amma kamar yadda wanda ya kira ku yake mai tsarki
1Peter1:16 gama a rubuce yake cewa
1Peter1:17 Tun da yake kuna kira ga Uba wanda yake yin wa kowane mutum shari’a bisa ga ayyukansa ba bambanci
1Peter1:18 Gama kun san cewa ba da abubuwa masu lalacewa kamar azurfa ko zinariya ce aka fanshe ku daga rayuwar banza da kuka karɓa daga kakanni-kakanninku ba
1Peter1:19 sai dai an fanshe ku da jini mai daraja na Kiristi
1Peter1:20 An zaɓe shi kafin halittar duniya
1Peter1:21 Ta gare shi ne kuka gaskata da Allah
1Peter1:22 Yanzu da kuka tsarkake kanku ta wurin yin biyayya ga gaskiyan nan
1Peter1:23 Gama an sāke haihuwarku
1Peter1:24 Gama
1Peter1:25 amma maganar Ubangiji tana nan har abada.” Wannan kuwa ita ce kalmar da aka yi muku wa’azi.

1Peter2:2 Kamar sababbin jarirai

1Peter2:4 Da kuka zo gare shi
1Peter2:5 ku ma
1Peter2:6 Gama a cikin Nassi an ce
1Peter2:7 A gare ku da kuka gaskata
1Peter2:8 kuma
1Peter2:9 Amma ku zaɓaɓɓu ne
1Peter2:10 Dā ku ba mutane ba ne
1Peter2:11 Abokaina ƙaunatattu
1Peter2:12 Ku yi irin rayuwa mai kyau a cikin masu bautar gumaka
1Peter2:13 Saboda Ubangiji
1Peter2:14 ko ga gwamnoni
1Peter2:15 Gama nufin Allah ne cewa ta wurin yin nagarta za ku toshe jahilcin marasa azanci.
1Peter2:16 Ku yi rayuwa kamar mutanen da aka ’yantar
1Peter2:17 Ku nuna ladabin da ya dace ga kowa. Ku ƙaunaci ’yan’uwantakar masu bi
1Peter2:18 Bayi
1Peter2:19 Gama abin yabo ne in mutum ya yi haƙuri cikin zafin wahalar rashin adalci saboda yana sane da Allah.
1Peter2:20 Amma ina abin taƙama in kuka sha duka saboda kun yi laifi kuka kuma jimre? Sai dai in kuka sha wahala saboda yin nagari kuka kuma jimre

2Peter1:1 Siman Bitrus
2Peter1:2 Alheri da salama su zama naku a yalwace ta wurin sanin Allah da Yesu Ubangijinmu.
2Peter1:3 Ikonsa na Allahntaka ya ba mu kome da muke bukata don rayuwa da kuma tsoron Allah ta wurin sanin wanda ya kira mu ta wurin ɗaukakarsa da nagartarsa.
2Peter1:4 Ta wurin waɗannan ya ba mu alkawaransa masu girma da kuma masu daraja
2Peter1:5 Saboda haka
2Peter1:6 ga sani kuma ku ƙara masa kamunkai; ga kamunkai kuma ku ƙara da daurewa; ga daurewa kuwa ku ƙara da tsoron Allah;
2Peter1:7 ga tsoron Allah kuma ku ƙara da nuna alheri ga ’yan’uwa; ga nuna alheri ga ’yan’uwa kuma ku ƙara da ƙauna.
2Peter1:8 Domin in kuna ƙaruwa a waɗannan halaye
2Peter1:9 Amma in wani ba shi da su
2Peter1:10 Saboda haka ’yan’uwana
2Peter1:11 za ku sami kyakkyawar marabta cikin madawwamin mulkin Ubangijinmu da Mai Cetonmu Yesu Kiristi.
2Peter1:12 Saboda haka kullum zan tuna muku da waɗannan
2Peter1:13 A ganina ya dace in tunashe ku muddin ina raye cikin tentin wannan jiki
2Peter1:14 domin na sani na kusa in ajiye shi a gefe
2Peter1:15 Zan kuwa yi iyakacin ƙoƙari in ga cewa bayan rabuwata kullum za ku iya tuna da waɗannan abubuwa.
2Peter1:16 Ba mu bi tatsuniyoyin da aka ƙaga da wayo sa’ad da muka gaya muku game da ikon Ubangijinmu Yesu Kiristi da zuwansa ba
2Peter1:17 Gama ya sami girma da ɗaukaka daga Allah Uba sa’ad da murya ta zo masa daga Mafificiyar Ɗaukaka cewa
2Peter1:18 Mu kanmu mun ji wannan muryar da ta zo daga sama sa’ad da muke tare da shi a kan dutse mai tsarki.
2Peter1:19 Muna kuwa da maganar annabawa da aka ƙara tabbatar mana
2Peter1:20 Gaba da kome dai
2Peter1:21 Gama annabci bai taɓa samo tushensa daga nufin mutum ba
2Peter2:1 Amma a dā akwai annabawan ƙarya a cikin mutane
2Peter2:2 Da yawa za su bi hanyoyinsu na rashin kunya su kuma sa a rena hanyar gaskiya.
2Peter2:3 Cikin kwaɗayinsu waɗannan malaman ƙarya za su cuce ku da tatsuniyoyin da suka ƙaga. Hukuncinsu yana a rataye a kansu tun da daɗewa
2Peter2:4 Gama in har Allah bai ƙyale mala’iku sa’ad da suka yi zunubi ba
2Peter2:5 in har bai ƙyale duniya ta dā ba sa’ad da ya kawo ambaliya a kan mutanenta marasa tsoron Allah
2Peter2:6 in har ya hukunta biranen Sodom da Gomorra ta wurin ƙone su suka zama toka
2Peter2:7 in kuwa har ya ceci Lot
2Peter2:8 (adon kuwa abin da adalin nan ya yi
2Peter2:9 in haka ne
2Peter2:10 Wannan gaskiya ce musamman ga waɗanda suke bin sha’awace-sha’awacen lalaci na mutuntaka
2Peter2:11 duk da haka ko mala’iku ma da suka fi su ƙarfi suka kuma fi su iko
2Peter2:12 Amma waɗannan mutane suna yin saɓo a kan abubuwan da ba su fahimta ba. Suna kama da dabbobi marasa hankali
2Peter2:13 Za a yi musu sakamako da muguntar da suka yi. A ra’ayinsu jin daɗi shi ne a yi annashuwa da rana tsaka. Su ƙazamai ne marasa kunya
2Peter2:14 Idanunsu sun cike da zina
2Peter2:15 Sun bar miƙaƙƙiyar hanya suka bauɗe suna bin hanyar Bala’am ɗan Beyor
2Peter2:16 Amma an tsawata masa saboda laifinsa ta wurin jaki
2Peter2:17 Waɗannan mutane maɓulɓulai ne babu ruwa da kuma hazon da guguwar iska take kora. An shirya matsanancin duhu dominsu.
2Peter2:18 Gama suna surutai banza na girman kai
2Peter2:19 Suna yin musu alkawarin ’yanci
2Peter2:20 In har sun kuɓuta daga lalacin duniya ta wurin sanin Ubangijinmu da kuma Mai Cetonmu Yesu Kiristi sai suka sāke koma a cikin lalacin
2Peter2:21 Zai fi musu kyau da ba su taɓa sanin hanyar adalci ba
2Peter2:22 A kansu karin maganan nan gaskiya ce
2Peter3:1 Abokaina ƙaunatattu
2Peter3:2 Ina so ku tuna da kalmomin da annabawa masu tsarki na dā suka faɗa da kuma umarnin da Ubangijinmu da Mai Cetonmu ya bayar ta wurin manzanninku.
2Peter3:3 Da farko dai
2Peter3:4 Za su ce
2Peter3:5 Amma da gangan suke manta cewa tun dā can ta wurin maganar Allah sammai suka kasance aka kuma yi ƙasa daga ruwa ta wurin ruwa kuma.
2Peter3:6 Ta wurin waɗannan ruwan ne aka nutsar
2Peter3:7 Ta wurin wannan magana ce aka ajiye sammai da ƙasa na yanzu domin wuta
2Peter3:8 Amma kada ku manta da wannan abu guda ɗaya
2Peter3:9 Ubangiji ba mai jinkiri ba ne wajen cika alkawarinsa
2Peter3:10 Amma ranar Ubangiji za tă zo kamar ɓarawo. Sammai za su ɓace da ruri
2Peter3:11 Da yake za a hallaka dukan abubuwa ta haka
2Peter3:12 yayinda kuke zuba ido ga zuwan ranar Allah kuna gaggauta zuwanta. Wannan rana za tă kawo wa sammai hallaka ta ƙunan wuta
2Peter3:13 Amma bisa ga alkawarinsa muna zuba ido ga sabuwar sama da kuma sabuwar ƙasa
2Peter3:14 Saboda haka
2Peter3:15 Ku yi zaman sanin cewa haƙurin Ubangijinmu yana nufin ceto ne
2Peter3:16 Haka yake rubutu cikin dukan wasiƙunsa
2Peter3:17 Saboda haka
2Peter3:18 Sai dai ku yi girma cikin alheri da sanin Ubangijinmu da Mai Cetonmu Yesu Kiristi. A gare shi ɗaukaka ta tabbata yanzu da har abada! Amin.

3John1:1 Dattijon nan
3John1:2 Abokina ƙaunatacce
3John1:3 Na yi farin ciki ƙwarai sa’ad da waɗansu ’yan’uwa suka zo suka yi zance game da yadda kake da aminci ga gaskiyan nan da kuma yadda kake cin gaba cikin gaskiyan nan.
3John1:4 Ba abin da ya fi sa ni farin ciki fiye da in ji cewa ’ya’yana suna cikin gaskiyan nan.
3John1:5 Abokina ƙaunatacce
3John1:6 Sun faɗa wa ikkilisiya game da ƙaunarka. Za ka kyauta in ka sallame su a hanyar da ta cancanci Allah.
3John1:7 Saboda Sunan nan ne suka fito
3John1:8 Saboda haka ya kamata mu nuna halin karɓan baƙi ga irin mutanen nan domin mu yi aiki tare saboda gaskiyan nan.
3John1:9 Na rubuta wa ikkilisiya
3John1:10 Saboda haka in na zo
3John1:11 Abokina ƙaunatacce
3John1:12 Demetiriyus yana da shaida mai kyau daga wurin kowa
3John1:13 Ina da abubuwa da dama da zan rubuta maka
3John1:14 Ina fata in gan ka nan ba da daɗewa ba
3John1:15 Salama gare ka. Abokai a nan suna gaishe ka. Ka gai da abokai a can da sunansu.

Jude1:2 Jinƙai
Jude1:3 Abokaina ƙaunatattu
Jude1:4 Na faɗa haka ne domin waɗansu mutanen da aka rubuta hukuncinsu tun dā sun shiga cikinku a ɓoye. Su fa marasa tsoron Allah ne. Su ne waɗanda suka mai da alherin Allahnmu ya zama dalilin yin fasikanci
Jude1:5 Ko da yake kun riga kun san duk wannan
Jude1:6 Haka ma mala’ikun da ba su riƙe matsayinsu na iko ba
Jude1:7 Haka ma Sodom da Gomorra da garuruwan da suke kewaye da su
Jude1:8 Haka yake da masu mafarke-mafarken nan
Jude1:9 Kai
Jude1:10 Duk da haka mutanen nan suna maganar banza a kan kome da ba su gane ba; kuma abubuwan da suka fahimta bisa ga jiki
Jude1:11 Kaitonsu! Gama sun kama hanyar Kayinu; sun ruga a guje garin neman riba cikin kuskure kamar Bala’am; aka kuma hallaka su cikin tawayen Kora.
Jude1:12 Waɗannan mutane sun zama kamar ƙazanta a taronku na soyayya
Jude1:13 Su kamar raƙuman ruwan teku ne masu hauka
Jude1:14 Enok ma
Jude1:15 don yă yi wa kowa shari’a

Jude1:19 Waɗannan mutanen ne
Jude1:20 Amma ku
Jude1:21 Ku zauna cikin ƙaunar Allah yayinda kuke jira jinƙan Ubangijinmu Yesu Kiristi don yă kawo ku ga rai madawwami.
Jude1:22 Ku ji tausayin waɗanda suke shakka;
Jude1:23 ku cece waɗansu ta wurin fizge su daga wuta. Ga waɗansu kuma ku ji tausayinsu
Jude1:24 To
Jude1:25 Gare shi kuma

Revelation2:1 “Zuwa ga mala’ikan ikkilisiya a Afisa
Revelation2:2 Na san ayyukanka
Revelation2:3 Kai kam ka daure ka kuma jimre da wahala saboda sunana
Revelation2:4 Duk da haka ina riƙe da wannan game da kai. Ka watsar da ƙaunarka ta farko.
Revelation2:5 Ka tuna da matsayinka a dā kafin ka fāɗi! Ka tuba ka kuma yi ayyukan da ka yi da fari. In ba ka tuba ba
